lessons.title: Career Exploration
lessons.description: Learn Career Exploration with focused discussion, examples, activity, and a 5-item quiz.
objectives: Understand key ideas in Career Exploration
Answer quiz items with evidence-based reasoning

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: This lesson introduces Career Exploration for Grade 10 TLE.

sections.heading: Main Discussion
sections.content: You will analyze key concepts, examples, and practical applications of Career Exploration.

sections.heading: Guided Examples
items: Identify key ideas in Career Exploration.
Connect the concept to real life.

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: This lesson on Career Exploration covered the key ideas, examples, activity, and quiz feedback.

activity.instruction: Match each concept with the correct explanation.

items.answer: Main concept discussed in the lesson
How the concept appears in daily life
How learners apply what they studied

quiz.question: What is a key focus in Career Exploration?
choices: Understanding the concept and applying it
quiz.answer: Understanding the concept and applying it
quiz.explanation: This lesson emphasizes understanding and application.

quiz.question: Why are guided examples important?
quiz.explanation: Examples model correct thinking and process.

quiz.question: True or False: Feedback helps improve answers.
What should you do after answering a question?
